name: Crab, Chili, Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cream cheese in half.
2. Mix the crabmeat with the sliced cream cheese.
3. Before serving, top the mixture with a chili sauce and Horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, Tobasco sauce, chopped chives, parsley, and salt combinations.
4. Serve with crackers.
